overview: Gayatri Vidya Parishad College for Degree and PG Courses (GVPCDPGC), established in 1989, is an autonomous educational institution located in the scenic area of Rushikonda, Visakhapatnam. It is a part of the Gayatri Vidya Parishad educational society. The college is recognized for its diverse academic portfolio, offering programs across Engineering, Management, Computer Applications, and Life Sciences. It serves as a significant hub for higher education in coastal Andhra Pradesh, emphasizing both academic rigor and professional skill development.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with a 'B++' Grade. Approved by AICTE, New Delhi. Affiliated with Andhra University (AU), Visakhapatnam.

coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 50% in PCM + AP EAPCET rank
Graduation with 50% aggregate + AP ICET rank
Graduation with Mathematics at 10+2 or Degree level + AP ICET rank

admissions.admissionProcess: Engineering (B.Tech) admissions are through AP EAPCET counseling. Management (MBA) and MCA admissions are via AP ICET. UG degree admissions (B.Sc/BBA/BCA) are primarily merit-based or through university-specific common entrance tests. Category B (Management Quota) seats are filled based on institutional merit.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–18, 2026; AP ICET 2026: May 2026; Counseling: July–August 2026.

facilities: Central Library with Digital Resource Access
campus.specialNote: The college is uniquely situated between the hills and the sea at Rushikonda, providing a calm and scenic academic environment. It is particularly noted for its School of Engineering and the School of Management Studies, which maintain strong ties with the Visakhapatnam industrial and IT corridors.

contact.address: GVPTower, Venkatrama Enclave, Rushikonda, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh - 530045
